problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
